pages.name: Home
pages.description: Landing page for the personal wellness and spirituality blog with quick access to all main sections, featured content, and a snapshot of today2s practice plan.
primary_functions: Give an overview of key sections: Articles, Meditations, Quizzes, Events, Affirmations, Challenges, Practices
Provide a global search bar to search across all content types
Highlight featured or recent articles, meditations, and upcoming events
Link directly into common tasks such as starting a quiz or viewing Today2s Practice

outgoing_connections.trigger: Submit global search form in the header or hero section
Click a featured article card
Click a featured upcoming event
Click a featured sleep meditation section CTA
Click 2Stress Check-in3 or quizzes teaser card
Click the Today2s Practice summary widget

access_methods.description: Accessible via the 'Home' header navigation link
Primary landing page URL of the site

pages.name: Articles
pages.description: Listing page for written content such as blog posts and guides, with filters for mindfulness and other topics and controls tailored to building reading lists.
primary_functions: Browse all articles and guides in a paginated list
Filter articles by topic (e.g., mindfulness_basics), format, and other tags
Filter articles by reading time using a 510 minute duration range control
Sort articles by newest_first, oldest_first, popularity, or reading_time
Open an article detail page (article.html?articleId=123) by clicking its title or card
Bookmark or save articles directly from the list into named reading lists or collections
Create new reading lists/collections when saving an article (e.g., 'Week 1 Mindfulness')
Return to previously applied filters and sort order after viewing an article

incoming_params.description: Preselected topic filter (e.g., 'Mindfulness Basics') for the article list.
Optional tag filter applied on load.
Minimum reading time in minutes for pre-filtering articles.
Maximum reading time in minutes for pre-filtering articles.
Initial sort option, e.g., 'newest_first' or 'reading_time'.
Current pagination page number.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click an article title or card in the list
Change filters or sorting controls and apply them

access_methods.description: Accessible via the 'Articles' header navigation link
Sharable URLs reflect topic, reading time, sort, and page filters via query parameters

pages.name: Article Detail
pages.description: Detail page for a single article or guide, including full content and save options for reading lists and collections.
primary_functions: Display the full article or guide content, including title, author, publication date, and reading time
Show content type label (e.g., article, guide) for filtering context
Allow saving the article to an existing or new reading list/collection via 'Save to List' or bookmark button
Support creation of a new collection/list inline by entering a name (e.g., 'Week 1 Mindfulness', 'Moon Rituals')
Provide navigation back to the previous list (e.g., Articles list or Search results)
Suggest related articles or guides for continued learning

incoming_params.description: ID of the article or guide to display.
Optional source context ('articles' or 'search') used to configure the 'Back to ...' link.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Back to Articles' when the user arrived from the Articles list
Click 'Back to Results' when the user arrived from Search

access_methods.description: Accessed when an articleId query parameter is present

pages.name: Meditations
pages.description: Meditation and audio library page for browsing and filtering tracks, and building playlists for different moods and times of day.
primary_functions: List meditation and audio tracks with key info (title, category, duration, rating)
Filter meditations by category (e.g., sleep), duration range (e.g., 1218 minutes), and rating thresholds (e.g., 4.5 stars & up)
Sort meditations by duration_shortest_first, duration_longest_first, newest_first, or rating
Add tracks to playlists using an 'Add to Playlist' action on each card
Create a new playlist (e.g., 'Evening Wind Down') when adding the first track
Add additional tracks to an existing playlist from the list view
Navigate to the playlists management page (playlists.html) via a link or button

incoming_params.description: Preselected category filter, e.g., 'sleep'.
Initial minimum duration filter in minutes.
Initial maximum duration filter in minutes.
Initial minimum average rating filter.
Sort option such as 'duration_shortest_first' or 'rating'.
Current pagination page number.
Optional playlist to preselect when adding tracks.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Change filters or sorting controls and apply them
Click 'View Playlist' after adding tracks to a playlist

access_methods.description: Accessible via the 'Meditations' header navigation link
Optional query parameters capture filter and sort state

pages.name: Playlists
pages.description: Page to view and manage meditation/audio playlists, including playlist detail views and playback controls.
primary_functions: Display a list of all user-created playlists with basic details (name, number of tracks, total duration)
Open a specific playlist (e.g., 'Evening Wind Down') to show its tracks and metadata
Reorder or remove tracks within a playlist
Play an individual track or start playing the entire playlist
Rename or delete existing playlists
Return to the Meditations page to add more tracks

incoming_params.description: ID of the playlist to open in detail view.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Add more tracks' from a playlist detail view

access_methods.description: Accessible via the 'Playlists' header navigation link
Playlist detail view is accessed by including a playlistId query parameter

pages.name: Search Results
pages.description: Unified search results page for queries across all content types (articles, guides, meditations, events, quizzes, practices) with saving to collections for reading-focused items.
primary_functions: Display search results for a query entered in the global search bar (e.g., 'full moon ritual')
Filter results by content type (e.g., guide, article, meditation, event)
Sort results by newest_first, relevance, or popularity
Open article or guide results in the Article Detail page (article.html?articleId=456)
Allow saving guides and articles to collections directly from results via a bookmark icon
Support creating a new collection (e.g., 'Moon Rituals') when saving the first item
Provide navigation back to the previous context or to other sections

incoming_params.description: Search query string entered by the user.
Comma-separated list of content types to filter results by, such as 'guide,article'.
Sort option for results (e.g., 'newest_first', 'relevance').
Current page of search results.
Number of results per page.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click an article or guide result title
Click an event result title
Click a quiz result title
Adjust search filters or sorting and re-run the search

access_methods.description: Accessed after submitting the global search form from any page
Search query and filters are represented via query parameters

pages.name: Quizzes
pages.description: Overview page listing available self-assessment quizzes and check-ins for stress, sleep, and other wellness topics.
primary_functions: List all available quizzes with titles, brief descriptions, and approximate completion time
Highlight the 'Stress Check-in (10 questions)' quiz for easy access
Filter or categorize quizzes by topic (e.g., stress, anxiety, sleep, self-compassion)
Open a quiz detail and taking experience (quiz.html?quizId=stress_check_in_10)
Show completion status or last taken date for each quiz where relevant

incoming_params.description: Optional topic filter to focus the quiz list (e.g., 'stress').

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click a quiz card, such as 'Stress Check-in (10 questions)'

access_methods.description: Accessible via the 'Quizzes' header navigation link

pages.name: Quiz Detail
pages.description: Interactive quiz-taking page that presents questions, collects answers, and shows results for a chosen assessment.
primary_functions: Display quiz title, description, and progress through questions
Present each question in sequence with selectable answer options
Allow navigation through questions using Next/Previous controls or a 'Continue' button
Validate and submit all answers at the end of the quiz
Calculate and display the overall result (e.g., stress level label: low, moderate, high)
Summarize results in a clear result panel after submission
Offer quick actions such as 'Reflect in Journal' linking to journal.html

incoming_params.description: ID of the quiz to load and present.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Reflect in Journal' on the results panel

access_methods.description: Accessed via quizId query parameter from the Quizzes list or Search results

pages.name: Journal
pages.description: Personal journaling space for recording reflections, including quiz assessment results and daily check-ins.
primary_functions: List existing journal entries with titles, dates, and brief excerpts
Create a new journal entry using a 'New Entry' or '+' action
Allow setting a title (e.g., 'Stress Check-in Result - YYYY-MM-DD') and body text for each entry
Save new entries and edits for later review
Edit or delete existing journal entries
Support quick insertion of quiz result summaries (e.g., stress level labels) into new entries

incoming_params.description: ID of the journal entry to open for viewing or editing.
Current page number in the paginated list of journal entries.
Number of journal entries to show per page.

access_methods.description: Accessible via the 'Journal' header navigation link
Optional query parameters select a specific entry and pagination

pages.name: Events & Workshops
pages.description: Events and workshops browser, including detail views and registration flows for live experiences like 'Breathwork for Anxiety'.
primary_functions: List upcoming events and workshops with titles, dates, times, and brief descriptions
Search events by keyword (e.g., 'Breathwork for Anxiety')
Filter events by date range (e.g., today to 30 days from today) and time-of-day segments (e.g., evening 69 PM)
Sort events by soonest_date_first or other options
Open an event detail view (e.g., events.html?eventId=breathwork_for_anxiety_1) showing full description and schedule
Provide an event registration form on the detail view with fields for name, email, and time zone
Submit registration and confirm reserved spot for the selected event

incoming_params.description: Optional search keyword used to pre-filter events (e.g., 'Breathwork for Anxiety').
Start of the date range filter in ISO format.
End of the date range filter in ISO format.
Time-of-day filter value such as 'evening'.
Sort option, e.g., 'soonest_date_first'.
Current page of event listings.
ID of the event to display in detail view.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Apply event search and filter changes

access_methods.description: Accessible via the 'Events' header navigation link
List and detail views driven by query parameters like eventId, dates, and filters

pages.name: Affirmations
pages.description: Library of affirmation statements with tools to group them into sets for scheduled reminders and daily practices.
primary_functions: Display a list/grid of affirmations with text and related tags (e.g., self_compassion)
Filter affirmations by category or tag (e.g., select self_compassion tag)
Add individual affirmations to sets using an 'Add to Set' button on each card
Create a new affirmation set inline when adding (e.g., 'Morning Self-Compassion')
Add affirmations to an existing set from the filtered list
Navigate to the Affirmation Sets page (affirmation_sets.html) via 'My Sets' or 'Manage Sets' links

incoming_params.description: Tag used to pre-filter affirmations (e.g., 'Self-Compassion').
Current page number within the affirmations list.
Number of affirmations to display per page.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'My Sets' or 'Manage Sets' in the affirmations toolbar
Click 'View Set' after creating a new affirmation set

access_methods.description: Accessible via the 'Affirmations' header navigation link
Tag filters and pagination can be encoded in query parameters

pages.name: Affirmation Sets
pages.description: Management page for affirmation sets, including scheduling daily reminders such as a 7:00 AM self-compassion practice.
primary_functions: List all user-defined affirmation sets with their names and number of affirmations
Open a specific set (e.g., 'Morning Self-Compassion') to view the included affirmations
Add or remove affirmations from an existing set
Configure reminder or schedule settings for a set using a 'Schedule' or 'Reminder Settings' control
Set reminder time (e.g., 7:00 AM) and frequency (e.g., daily) for the selected set
Save updated scheduling settings and reflect them in the set overview

incoming_params.description: ID of the affirmation set to open and manage.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Add more affirmations' from a set detail view to browse affirmations

access_methods.description: Reached via 'My Sets' / 'Manage Sets' links from the Affirmations page
A setId query parameter opens a specific set detail view

pages.name: Challenges & Programs
pages.description: Page for discovering, filtering, and joining multi-day wellness challenges and programs such as digital detox journeys.
primary_functions: List available challenges/programs with tags such as digital_detox, duration, and difficulty
Filter challenges by topic/tag (e.g., digital_detox), duration (e.g., 3 days), and difficulty (e.g., easy)
Sort challenges by most_popular, recommended, or newest_first
Open a challenge detail view (e.g., challenges.html?challengeId=digital_detox_3_day_easy) showing structure and daily breakdown
Join a challenge using a 'Join Challenge' or 'Start Challenge' button
Choose a start date via a date picker (e.g., the upcoming Monday) and confirm joining starting on that date

incoming_params.description: Challenge topic/tag filter such as 'Digital Detox'.
Duration filter in days (e.g., 3).
Difficulty filter value such as 'easy'.
Sort option like 'most_popular' or 'recommended'.
Current page of challenge listings.
ID of the challenge to open in detail mode.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Apply challenge filters or sorting

access_methods.description: Accessible via the 'Challenges' header navigation link
List and detail views driven by query parameters like challengeId and filters

pages.name: Practices & Yoga
pages.description: Catalog of yoga sequences and other guided practices with filters by level, intention, and duration, supporting quick addition to Today2s Practice.
primary_functions: Display a list of practices/yoga sequences with title, difficulty, intention/time-of-day, duration, and rating
Filter by difficulty (e.g., beginner), intention/time-of-day (e.g., evening), and duration range (e.g., minimum 20 minutes)
Sort sequences by top_rated, most_popular, duration, or newest_first
Open individual practice detail views (e.g., practices.html?practiceId=evening_beginner_1) in the same or new tab
Show detailed information for each practice, including rating, steps, and required equipment
Add a sequence to 'Today2s Practice' using an 'Add to Today2s Practice' or similar button on the detail view
Provide a link to open the Today2s Practice summary page (todays_practice.html)

incoming_params.description: Difficulty filter for practices, e.g., 'beginner'.
Intention/time-of-day filter such as 'evening'.
Minimum duration in minutes for filtered practices.
Maximum duration in minutes for filtered practices.
Sort option like 'top_rated' or 'most_popular'.
Current page of practice listings.
ID of the practice to open in detail view.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Apply or update practice filters and sort order
Click 'View Today2s Practice' after adding a sequence to today2s plan

access_methods.description: Accessible via the 'Practices' header navigation link
Filters and practice detail selection are encoded in query parameters

pages.name: Today2s Practice
pages.description: Daily practice summary showing all practices planned for the current day, with tools to reorder and mark completion.
primary_functions: Display all practices added for today, including yoga sequences and possibly other activities
Show key details for each practice (title, duration, difficulty, intention)
Allow reordering or removing items from today2s plan
Provide an option to mark practices as completed
Offer quick links back to related detail pages (e.g., practices.html?practiceId=123) for reviewing instructions before starting

incoming_params.description: Date for which to view the practice plan in ISO format; defaults to today when omitted.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Add more practices' from the Today2s Practice summary
Click a practice title to review its detailed instructions

access_methods.description: Accessible via the 'Today2s Practice' header navigation link
Optional date query parameter selects which day2s plan to view

pages.name: About
pages.description: Background information about the personal wellness and spirituality blog and its purpose, including mission and creator story.
primary_functions: Explain the mission and focus of the site (mindfulness, spirituality, and personal wellness)
Introduce the creator or guiding philosophy behind the content
Set expectations for how to use the site2s sections effectively
Link to related informational pages such as Contact and Privacy & Terms

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click a 'Contact' link within the About page content
Click a 'Privacy & Terms' link within the About page content

access_methods.description: Accessible via the 'About' footer navigation link
Linked from other informational sections like Contact

pages.name: Contact
pages.description: Page for contacting the site owner for feedback, suggestions, or support, with a simple contact form.
primary_functions: Provide a contact form for sending messages or feedback
Display any relevant contact information or response-time expectations
Offer quick links to About and Privacy & Terms for additional context

incoming_params.description: Optional subject line prefill for the contact form.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click an 'About' link near the contact form
Click a 'Privacy & Terms' link near the contact form

access_methods.description: Accessible via the 'Contact' footer navigation link
Contact messages are sent via the contact form on this page

pages.name: Privacy & Terms
pages.description: Combined page outlining privacy practices and terms of use for the site, including data handling for personal content like journal entries and playlists.
primary_functions: Describe how user data (such as journal entries, playlists, and schedules) is stored and used
Provide terms of use, disclaimers, and any usage guidelines
Link back to key sections like About and Contact for further questions

incoming_params.description: Optional section anchor to scroll to, such as 'privacy' or 'terms'.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'About' from within the Privacy & Terms content
Click a 'Contact us about this policy' link

access_methods.description: Accessible via the 'Privacy & Terms' footer navigation link

footer_links.description: About this wellness and spirituality blog
Privacy policy and terms of use
